goal: UR10 builtin pick-place with an ELEVATED conveyor (z=0.95) to test whether CP-78's success pattern (cube ≥15cm above robot base) extends to conveyor-fed scenarios. Conveyor mounted on a fixed stand 20cm above table top puts cube at z=0.985 — within UR10's reachable workspace AND on a moving belt for industrial realism.
thoughts:
Six elevated-conveyor specifics for CP-80 (combines CP-78's geometry with CP-69's belt motion):
1) UR10 base on table at (0, 0, 0.75) — same as CP-69/74/78.
2) Conveyor stand: a fixed 20cm-tall pedestal at (-0.5, 0.4, 0.85) (table_top + 10cm). Stand top at z=0.95.
3) Conveyor mounted on stand: position [-0.5, 0.4, 0.96], size 1.0×0.3×0.05m. Belt surface at z=0.985.
4) Cube starts at (-1.0, 0.4, 1.01) — flows on belt toward UR10 reach window.
5) Bin at world (0.5, -0.4, 0.75) — same as CP-69/74. Drop point at z=0.825.
6) Cube center now 26cm above robot base (vs 8.5cm in CP-69) — well within UR10's comfortable reach band. If FixedJoint workaround forms a clean pickup at this height, transit to bin should clear table edges.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# UR10 base on table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", prim_type="Xform")
add_reference(prim_path="/World/UR10", reference_path="/mnt/shared_data/isaac-sim-assets-complete-5.0.0/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Collected_Robots/ur10.usd")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

# Conveyor stand — 20cm pedestal beneath the elevated conveyor
create_prim(prim_path="/World/ConveyorStand", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.85], scale=[0.5, 0.15, 0.10])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/ConveyorStand", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Elevated conveyor — top surface at z=0.985 (stand top 0.95 + conveyor body 0.025 + half cube 0.025)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.96],
    size=[1.0, 0.3, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Cube on belt — z=1.01 = belt_top + half_cube
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.85, 0.4, 1.01], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")

# Bin on table
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0.5, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

# Pick sensor at conveyor pick zone
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[-0.4, 0.4, 1.01], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# UR10 builtin PickPlaceController (FixedJoint workaround for IsaacSurfaceGripper bug)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="builtin",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    end_effector_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.02],
)
extension_notes: CP-80 combines CP-78's elevated-cube geometry (≥22cm above robot base) with CP-69's conveyor pattern. Tests whether the FixedJoint workaround scales from static-cube delivery to belt-fed scenes. If function-gate passes, the elevated-conveyor pattern is the canonical UR10 + belt template; CP-69..CP-74 should be retro-fitted with a similar stand to unlock function-gate.
failure_modes: Belt pause: builtin handler's _on_step pauses belt when claiming a cube. The pause needs to actually take effect (CP-74 had belt-pause-from-callback issues — verify in this elevated config).
Bin reach: bin at z=0.75 is 23cm BELOW belt at z=0.985. Drop phase requires UR10 to descend that far while holding cube. RmpFlow may struggle if descent is too aggressive.
Conveyor stand collision: UR10 transit path passes near the stand at +X; planning_obstacles not configured — Sprint 4+ to add scene obstacles to RmpFlow.
Same UR10 init quirks as CP-78 — articulation re-init fallback, mirror home pose.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✗ (belt-pause-from-callback bug — verified that surfaceVelocityEnabled toggle ALSO doesn't propagate from inside _on_step. PhysX-level integrator caches independently of USD attribute layer)

migration_deferred.details: UR10 elevated-conveyor variant of CP-78; pick_place pattern fits but UR10 belt-pause-from-callback bug remains unresolved
